title: OpenAI has seen a 'resurgence' of interest in secondary markets.
excerpt: For most of this year, investors couldn't get enough of Anthropic while ignoring OpenAI. Now the tide is turning following the release of new models.
content_html:
By Ben Bergman

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

For most of this year, investors couldn't get enough of Anthropic while largely ignoring OpenAI. Now the tide is turning: although Anthropic remains the clear favorite, OpenAI is experiencing a significant surge in demand after it released highly touted new models and saw success with its AI coding agent, Codex.

"In the last month, there has been a resurgence in interest," said Dave McClure, founder and managing partner at Practical Venture Capital, which buys secondary shares in pre-IPO companies.

Since Anthropic and OpenAI have yet to go public, the vast majority of investors buy via secondary markets, where existing stock is sold by employees or early investors. The market is fragmented and illiquid, so quoted valuations are estimates rather than continuous public-market prices.

"OpenAI was facing a lot of negative stories in the first quarter related to things like slower growth, executives sick or leaving, Anthropic racing past them, and the Elon Musk lawsuit," McClure said. "This resulted in dramatically less demand in the early second quarter for OpenAI secondary."

Anthropic still dominates, drawing five buyers for every two seeking OpenAI shares, according to Glen Anderson, CEO of Rainmaker Securities, a merchant bank focused on private stock transactions.

"A month ago, we were seeing limited demand for OpenAI," he said. "We're still seeing breakneck demand for Anthropic, but now you're seeing OpenAI get bid on a lot more often."

OpenAI did not respond to a request for comment.

Optimism about new models

Secondary traders Business Insider spoke with said that OpenAI's newest models and coding agent, Codex, have given buyers a reason to take another look after months in which Anthropic commanded most of the momentum.

OpenAI previewed its flagship GPT-5.6 Sol model in June and released it more broadly this month alongside GPT-5.6 Terra and the lower-cost GPT-5.6 Luna. Independent benchmarks have placed GPT-5.6 Sol near the top of the field, though still below Claude's latest Mythos and Fable models.

"Investors are coming back to OpenAI," said Adam Crawley, cofounder of Augment, an exchange for pre-IPO tech companies.

Mark Klein, president and CEO of Neostellar, which provides access to late-stage startups, said he has been encouraged by an OpenAI executive disclosing last week that the company has reached 9 million active users across two of its flagship enterprise platforms: Codex, an autonomous AI agent designed for complex software engineering and coding tasks, and ChatGPT Work, a newly launched cloud-based AI assistant that executes multi-step professional workflows.

"The pace of that growth is notable because it suggests agentic AI is expanding beyond its initial developer audience and into a much broader range of professional workflows," Klein said. "More broadly, OpenAI appears focused on translating continued model improvements into sustained usage across coding, research, and knowledge work."

OpenAI is the cheaper stock

Until this year, Anthropic was the clear bargain, consistently trading at a significant discount to OpenAI. Now that the dynamic has flipped, some traders say it makes sense to hedge their Anthropic positions by purchasing the relatively cheaper OpenAI stock.

Anthropic soared to a $1.2 trillion valuation on secondary markets, Business Insider reported last week. OpenAI is now trading at a $933 billion valuation, up 20% over the past three months, according to data from Caplight, a secondary trading platform.

Last week, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took personal responsibility for the company's recent struggles while signaling a major comeback.

"We did not have our best last 12 months ever, which is mostly my fault, but we are about to have our best 12 months to date," he posted on X.

On the same day as Altman's admission, Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a powerful new model that the startup says is the largest open-weight AI system in the world.

"There continues to be pressure from other Chinese and Open-source competitors that will likely put pressure on OpenAI growth and margins, so they still have a tough hill to climb," said McClure.

Ben Bergman

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

I'm a senior correspondent at Business Insider, where I investigate the tech industry with a focus on venture capital and startups.I can frequently be seen on CNN, NBC News, CBS News, and other channels providing analysis on a range of business and economic topics. I also appear at dozens of the biggest events around the world, including the World Economic Forum, HumanX, and Web Summit.Please get in touch if you have a story to tell securely on Signal. Here are some examples of stories I've written:

  • Adam Neumann created a secretive billion-dollar startup to turn apartment living into a utopian fantasy. I was the first reporter to set foot inside.
  • '2024 will be the year of the zombie VC reckoning.' The first wave of walking-dead venture firms is here and it's already causing headaches for tech founders.
  • 'Where ambition goes to die': These tech workers flocked to Austin during the pandemic. Now they're desperate to get out.
  • Mira Murati doubled the fundraising target for her new AI startup to $2 billion. It could be the largest seed round in history.
  • EvenUp's valuation soared past $1 billion on the potential of its AI. The startup has relied on humans to do much of the work, former employees say.
  • Half of Sequoia Capital's VC funds since 2018 have posted losses for the University of California's endowment
  • How Whitney Wolfe Herd's fateful deal with a Russian mogul deprived early Bumble employees of a stock windfall when she became a billionaire
  • Mailchimp employees are furious after the company's founders promised to never sell, withheld equity, and then sold it for $12 billion
  • 'My job is not to be the best friend of the CEO': Upfront's Mark Suster prides himself on being hard on founders, but some say his tough-love approach has gone too far
  • Exclusive: The University of California has invested billions in venture capital firms since 2000 and it has lost hundreds of millions so far. Here's why.

Here is a little more about me: Before I joined Insider, I was a senior reporter at dot.LA and produced two investigative documentaries for public television, one of which won first place in the 2020 Los Angeles Press Club investigation category. The judges called it "in-depth and informative reporting at its best."I spent the 2017-2018 academic year at Columbia Business School as a Knight-Bagehot fellow in economic and business journalism, taking MBA-level courses in corporate finance, financial accounting, and corporate strategy. After that, I oversaw the development of The Journal, a daily podcast produced by The Wall Street Journal and Gimlet Media.Previously, I was a senior reporter and host at KPCC/Southern California Public Radio, where I covered business and economics. I have also written for The New York Times and Columbia Journalism Review and was a reporting intern at The Times.Originally from Seattle, I graduated cum laude from Occidental College in Los Angeles with a degree in politics.In my free time, I love skiing, tennis, and poker (I competed in the 2024 World Series of Poker Main Event but sadly did not win).

sentences.en: Now the tide is turning: although Anthropic remains the clear favorite, OpenAI is experiencing a significant surge in demand after it released highly touted new models and saw success with its AI coding agent, Codex.
sentences.zh: 现在潮流正在转变：尽管 Anthropic 仍然是最受欢迎的，但 OpenAI 在发布备受推崇的新模型​​并凭借其 AI 编码代理 Codex 取得成功后，需求大幅增长。

blocks.html_en: "In the last month, there has been a resurgence in interest," said Dave McClure, founder and managing partner at Practical Venture Capital, which buys secondary shares in pre-IPO companies.

blocks.html_en: Since Anthropic and OpenAI have yet to go public, the vast majority of investors buy via secondary markets, where existing stock is sold by employees or early investors. The market is fragmented and illiquid, so quoted valuations are estimates rather than continuous public-market prices.

sentences.en: Since Anthropic and OpenAI have yet to go public, the vast majority of investors buy via secondary markets, where existing stock is sold by employees or early investors.
sentences.zh: 由于 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 尚未上市，绝大多数投资者通过二级市场购买，现有股票由员工或早期投资者出售。

sentences.en: The market is fragmented and illiquid, so quoted valuations are estimates rather than continuous public-market prices.
sentences.zh: 市场分散且缺乏流动性，因此所引用的估值只是估计值，而不是连续的公开市场价格。

blocks.html_en: "OpenAI was facing a lot of negative stories in the first quarter related to things like slower growth, executives sick or leaving, Anthropic racing past them, and the Elon Musk lawsuit," McClure said. "This resulted in dramatically less demand in the early second quarter for OpenAI secondary."

sentences.zh: 麦克卢尔表示：“OpenAI 在第一季度面临着许多负面报道，比如增长放缓、高管生病或离职、Anthropic 超越他们以及埃隆·马斯克诉讼等。”

sentences.en: "This resulted in dramatically less demand in the early second quarter for OpenAI secondary."
sentences.zh: “这导致第二季度初对 OpenAI 二级市场的需求大幅减少。”

blocks.html_en: Anthropic still dominates, drawing five buyers for every two seeking OpenAI shares, according to Glen Anderson, CEO of Rainmaker Securities, a merchant bank focused on private stock transactions.

sentences.en: Anthropic still dominates, drawing five buyers for every two seeking OpenAI shares, according to Glen Anderson, CEO of Rainmaker Securities, a merchant bank focused on private stock transactions.

blocks.html_en: "A month ago, we were seeing limited demand for OpenAI," he said. "We're still seeing breakneck demand for Anthropic, but now you're seeing OpenAI get bid on a lot more often."

sentences.en: "A month ago, we were seeing limited demand for OpenAI," he said.
sentences.zh: “一个月前，我们发现对 OpenAI 的需求有限，”他说。

sentences.en: "We're still seeing breakneck demand for Anthropic, but now you're seeing OpenAI get bid on a lot more often."
sentences.zh: “我们仍然看到对 Anthropic 的巨大需求，但现在你会看到 OpenAI 更频繁地受到竞标。”

blocks.html_en: OpenAI did not respond to a request for comment.

sentences.en: OpenAI did not respond to a request for comment.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 没有回应置评请求。

sentences.en: Optimism about new models
sentences.zh: 对新车型的乐观态度

blocks.html_en: Secondary traders Business Insider spoke with said that OpenAI's newest models and coding agent, Codex, have given buyers a reason to take another look after months in which Anthropic commanded most of the momentum.

sentences.en: Secondary traders Business Insider spoke with said that OpenAI's newest models and coding agent, Codex, have given buyers a reason to take another look after months in which Anthropic commanded most of the momentum.
sentences.zh: Business Insider 采访的二级交易商表示，在 Anthropic 占据主导地位的几个月后，OpenAI 的最新模型和编码代理 Codex 给了买家重新审视的理由。

blocks.html_en: OpenAI previewed its flagship GPT-5.6 Sol model in June and released it more broadly this month alongside GPT-5.6 Terra and the lower-cost GPT-5.6 Luna. Independent benchmarks have placed GPT-5.6 Sol near the top of the field, though still below Claude's latest Mythos and Fable models.

sentences.en: OpenAI previewed its flagship GPT-5.6 Sol model in June and released it more broadly this month alongside GPT-5.6 Terra and the lower-cost GPT-5.6 Luna.
sentences.zh: OpenAI 在 6 月份预览了其旗舰 GPT-5.6 Sol 模型，并于本月与 GPT-5.6 Terra 和成本较低的 GPT-5.6 Luna 一起更广泛地发布。

sentences.en: Independent benchmarks have placed GPT-5.6 Sol near the top of the field, though still below Claude's latest Mythos and Fable models.
sentences.zh: 独立基准测试将 GPT-5.6 Sol 置于该领域的顶尖水平，但仍低于 Claude 最新的 Mythos 和 Fable 模型。

blocks.html_en: "Investors are coming back to OpenAI," said Adam Crawley, cofounder of Augment, an exchange for pre-IPO tech companies.

sentences.en: "Investors are coming back to OpenAI," said Adam Crawley, cofounder of Augment, an exchange for pre-IPO tech companies.
sentences.zh: “投资者正在回归 OpenAI，”Augment 联合创始人 Adam Crawley 说道，Augment 是一家针对 IPO 前科技公司的交易所。

blocks.html_en: Mark Klein, president and CEO of Neostellar, which provides access to late-stage startups, said he has been encouraged by an OpenAI executive disclosing last week that the company has reached 9 million active users across two of its flagship enterprise platforms: Codex, an autonomous AI agent designed for complex software engineering and coding tasks, and ChatGPT Work, a newly launched cloud-based AI assistant that executes multi-step professional workflows.

sentences.en: Mark Klein, president and CEO of Neostellar, which provides access to late-stage startups, said he has been encouraged by an OpenAI executive disclosing last week that the company has reached 9 million active users across two of its flagship enterprise platforms: Codex, an autonomous AI agent designed for complex software engineering and coding tasks, and ChatGPT Work, a newly launched cloud-based AI assistant that executes multi-step professional workflows.
sentences.zh: Neostellar 的总裁兼首席执行官 Mark Klein 表示，OpenAI 的一位高管上周透露，该公司在其两个旗舰企业平台上的活跃用户已达到 900 万，这让他深受鼓舞：Codex 是一款专为复杂软件工程和编码任务而设计的自主 AI 代理，而 ChatGPT Work 是一款新推出的基于云的 AI 助手，可以执行多步骤的专业工作流程。

blocks.html_en: "The pace of that growth is notable because it suggests agentic AI is expanding beyond its initial developer audience and into a much broader range of professional workflows," Klein said. "More broadly, OpenAI appears focused on translating continued model improvements into sustained usage across coding, research, and knowledge work."

sentences.en: "The pace of that growth is notable because it suggests agentic AI is expanding beyond its initial developer audience and into a much broader range of professional workflows," Klein said.
sentences.zh: 克莱因说：“这种增长速度引人注目，因为它表明代理人工智能正在扩展到最初的开发人员受众之外，并进入更广泛的专业工作流程。”

sentences.en: "More broadly, OpenAI appears focused on translating continued model improvements into sustained usage across coding, research, and knowledge work."
sentences.zh: “更广泛地说，OpenAI 似乎专注于将持续的模型改进转化为编码、研究和知识工作的持续使用。”

blocks.html_en: OpenAI is the cheaper stock

sentences.en: OpenAI is the cheaper stock
sentences.zh: OpenAI 是最便宜的股票

blocks.html_en: Until this year, Anthropic was the clear bargain, consistently trading at a significant discount to OpenAI. Now that the dynamic has flipped, some traders say it makes sense to hedge their Anthropic positions by purchasing the relatively cheaper OpenAI stock.

sentences.en: Until this year, Anthropic was the clear bargain, consistently trading at a significant discount to OpenAI.
sentences.zh: 直到今年，Anthropic 的交易价格一直明显低于 OpenAI。

sentences.en: Now that the dynamic has flipped, some traders say it makes sense to hedge their Anthropic positions by purchasing the relatively cheaper OpenAI stock.
sentences.zh: 现在情况发生了逆转，一些交易员表示，通过购买相对便宜的 OpenAI 股票来对冲 Anthropic 头寸是有意义的。

blocks.html_en: Anthropic soared to a $1.2 trillion valuation on secondary markets, Business Insider reported last week. OpenAI is now trading at a $933 billion valuation, up 20% over the past three months, according to data from Caplight, a secondary trading platform.

sentences.en: Anthropic soared to a $1.2 trillion valuation on secondary markets, Business Insider reported last week.
sentences.zh: 据 Business Insider 上周报道，Anthropic 在二级市场的估值飙升至 1.2 万亿美元。

sentences.en: OpenAI is now trading at a $933 billion valuation, up 20% over the past three months, according to data from Caplight, a secondary trading platform.
sentences.zh: 根据二级交易平台 Caplight 的数据，OpenAI 目前的估值为 9330 亿美元，过去三个月上涨了 20%。

blocks.html_en: Last week, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took personal responsibility for the company's recent struggles while signaling a major comeback.

sentences.en: Last week, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman took personal responsibility for the company's recent struggles while signaling a major comeback.
sentences.zh: 上周，OpenAI 首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 对公司最近的困境承担了个人责任，同时发出了重大东山再起的信号。

blocks.html_en: "We did not have our best last 12 months ever, which is mostly my fault, but we are about to have our best 12 months to date," he posted on X.

sentences.en: "We did not have our best last 12 months ever, which is mostly my fault, but we are about to have our best 12 months to date," he posted on X.
sentences.zh: 他在 X 上发帖称：“过去 12 个月我们没有取得有史以来最好的成绩，这主要是我的错，但我们即将迎来迄今为止最好的 12 个月。”

blocks.html_en: On the same day as Altman's admission, Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a powerful new model that the startup says is the largest open-weight AI system in the world.

sentences.en: On the same day as Altman's admission, Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI released Kimi K3, a powerful new model that the startup says is the largest open-weight AI system in the world.
sentences.zh: 在 Altman 承认的同一天，中国人工智能初创公司 Moonshot AI 发布了 Kimi K3，这是一个强大的新模型，该初创公司称该模型是世界上最大的开放权重人工智能系统。

blocks.html_en: "There continues to be pressure from other Chinese and Open-source competitors that will likely put pressure on OpenAI growth and margins, so they still have a tough hill to climb," said McClure.

sentences.en: "There continues to be pressure from other Chinese and Open-source competitors that will likely put pressure on OpenAI growth and margins, so they still have a tough hill to climb," said McClure.
sentences.zh: 麦克卢尔表示：“来自其他中国和开源竞争对手的压力仍然存在，这可能会给 OpenAI 的增长和利润带来压力，因此他们仍有一段艰难的路要爬。”

I also appear at dozens of the biggest events around the world, including the World Economic Forum, HumanX, and Web Summit.Please get in touch if you have a story to tell securely on Signal. Here are some examples of stories I've written:

sentences.en: I'm a senior correspondent at Business Insider, where I investigate the tech industry with a focus on venture capital and startups.I can frequently be seen on CNN, NBC News, CBS News, and other channels providing analysis on a range of business and economic topics.
sentences.zh: 我是《商业内幕》的高级记者，主要调查科技行业，重点关注风险投资和初创企业。我经常出现在 CNN、NBC 新闻、哥伦比亚广播公司新闻和其他频道上，提供一系列商业和经济主题的分析。

sentences.en: I also appear at dozens of the biggest events around the world, including the World Economic Forum, HumanX, and Web Summit.Please get in touch if you have a story to tell securely on Signal.
sentences.zh: 我还出席了世界各地的数十场大型活动，包括世界经济论坛、HumanX 和网络峰会。如果您有需要在 Signal 上安全讲述的故事，请与我们联系。

sentences.en: Here are some examples of stories I've written:
sentences.zh: 以下是我写过的一些故事的例子：

blocks.html_en: • Adam Neumann created a secretive billion-dollar startup to turn apartment living into a utopian fantasy. I was the first reporter to set foot inside.

sentences.en: Adam Neumann created a secretive billion-dollar startup to turn apartment living into a utopian fantasy.
sentences.zh: 亚当·诺依曼 (Adam Neumann) 创建了一家价值数十亿美元的秘密初创公司，将公寓生活变成乌托邦式的幻想。

sentences.en: I was the first reporter to set foot inside.
sentences.zh: 我是第一个踏入内部的记者。

blocks.html_en: • '2024 will be the year of the zombie VC reckoning.' The first wave of walking-dead venture firms is here and it's already causing headaches for tech founders.

sentences.en: '2024 will be the year of the zombie VC reckoning.'
sentences.zh: “2024 年将是僵尸风投清算之年。”

sentences.en: The first wave of walking-dead venture firms is here and it's already causing headaches for tech founders.
sentences.zh: 第一波行尸走肉的风险投资公司已经到来，它已经让科技创始人们头疼不已。

blocks.html_en: • 'Where ambition goes to die': These tech workers flocked to Austin during the pandemic. Now they're desperate to get out.

sentences.en: 'Where ambition goes to die': These tech workers flocked to Austin during the pandemic.
sentences.zh: “野心消亡的地方”：这些科技工作者在疫情期间涌向奥斯汀。

sentences.en: Now they're desperate to get out.
sentences.zh: 现在他们迫切地想出去。

blocks.html_en: • Mira Murati doubled the fundraising target for her new AI startup to $2 billion. It could be the largest seed round in history.

sentences.en: Mira Murati doubled the fundraising target for her new AI startup to $2 billion.
sentences.zh: Mira Murati 将她新成立的人工智能初创公司的筹款目标翻了一番，达到 20 亿美元。

sentences.en: It could be the largest seed round in history.
sentences.zh: 这可能是历史上最大的种子轮融资。

blocks.html_en: • EvenUp's valuation soared past $1 billion on the potential of its AI. The startup has relied on humans to do much of the work, former employees say.

sentences.en: EvenUp's valuation soared past $1 billion on the potential of its AI.
sentences.zh: EvenUp 因其人工智能潜力而估值飙升至 10 亿美元以上。

sentences.en: The startup has relied on humans to do much of the work, former employees say.
sentences.zh: 前员工表示，这家初创公司的大部分工作都依赖人类来完成。

blocks.html_en: • Half of Sequoia Capital's VC funds since 2018 have posted losses for the University of California's endowment

sentences.en: Half of Sequoia Capital's VC funds since 2018 have posted losses for the University of California's endowment
sentences.zh: 自 2018 年以来，红杉资本一半的风险投资基金都对加州大学捐赠基金造成了损失

blocks.html_en: • How Whitney Wolfe Herd's fateful deal with a Russian mogul deprived early Bumble employees of a stock windfall when she became a billionaire

sentences.en: How Whitney Wolfe Herd's fateful deal with a Russian mogul deprived early Bumble employees of a stock windfall when she became a billionaire
sentences.zh: 当惠特尼·沃尔夫·赫德 (Whitney Wolfe Herd) 成为亿万富翁时，她与一位俄罗斯大亨的致命交易如何让 Bumble 早期员工失去了股票意外之财

blocks.html_en: • Mailchimp employees are furious after the company's founders promised to never sell, withheld equity, and then sold it for $12 billion

sentences.en: Mailchimp employees are furious after the company's founders promised to never sell, withheld equity, and then sold it for $12 billion
sentences.zh: Mailchimp 创始人承诺永远不会出售、扣留股权，然后以 120 亿美元的价格出售后，员工们感到愤怒

blocks.html_en: • 'My job is not to be the best friend of the CEO': Upfront's Mark Suster prides himself on being hard on founders, but some say his tough-love approach has gone too far

sentences.en: 'My job is not to be the best friend of the CEO': Upfront's Mark Suster prides himself on being hard on founders, but some say his tough-love approach has gone too far
sentences.zh: “我的工作不是成为首席执行官最好的朋友”：Upfront 的马克·苏斯特 (Mark Suster) 为自己对创始人的严厉而感到自豪，但有些人说他的强硬态度太过分了

blocks.html_en: • Exclusive: The University of California has invested billions in venture capital firms since 2000 and it has lost hundreds of millions so far. Here's why.

sentences.en: Exclusive: The University of California has invested billions in venture capital firms since 2000 and it has lost hundreds of millions so far.
sentences.zh: 独家报道：自2000年以来，加州大学已向风险投资公司投资了数十亿美元，迄今为止已损失数亿美元。

sentences.en: Here's why.
sentences.zh: 原因如下。

blocks.html_en: Here is a little more about me: Before I joined Insider, I was a senior reporter at dot.LA and produced two investigative documentaries for public television, one of which won first place in the 2020 Los Angeles Press Club investigation category. The judges called it "in-depth and informative reporting at its best."I spent the 2017-2018 academic year at Columbia Business School as a Knight-Bagehot fellow in economic and business journalism, taking MBA-level courses in corporate finance, financial accounting, and corporate strategy. After that, I oversaw the development of The Journal, a daily podcast produced by The Wall Street Journal and Gimlet Media.Previously, I was a senior reporter and host at KPCC/Southern California Public Radio, where I covered business and economics. I have also written for The New York Times and Columbia Journalism Review and was a reporting intern at The Times.Originally from Seattle, I graduated cum laude from Occidental College in Los Angeles with a degree in politics.In my free time, I love skiing, tennis, and poker (I competed in the 2024 World Series of Poker Main Event but sadly did not win).

sentences.en: Here is a little more about me: Before I joined Insider, I was a senior reporter at dot.LA and produced two investigative documentaries for public television, one of which won first place in the 2020 Los Angeles Press Club investigation category.
sentences.zh: 以下是关于我的更多信息：在加入 Insider 之前，我是 dot.LA 的高级记者，并为公共电视台制作了两部调查纪录片，其中一部在 2020 年洛杉矶新闻俱乐部调查类别中获得第一名。

sentences.en: The judges called it "in-depth and informative reporting at its best."I spent the 2017-2018 academic year at Columbia Business School as a Knight-Bagehot fellow in economic and business journalism, taking MBA-level courses in corporate finance, financial accounting, and corporate strategy.
sentences.zh: 评委们称其为“深度、信息丰富的最佳报道”。 2017-2018 学年，我在哥伦比亚商学院作为经济和商业新闻领域的 Knight-Bagehot 研究员，学习了企业财务、财务会计和企业战略方面的 MBA 级别课程。

sentences.en: After that, I oversaw the development of The Journal, a daily podcast produced by The Wall Street Journal and Gimlet Media.Previously, I was a senior reporter and host at KPCC/Southern California Public Radio, where I covered business and economics.
sentences.zh: 此后，我负责监督《华尔街日报》的发展，这是由《华尔街日报》和 Gimlet Media 制作的每日播客。此前，我是 KPCC/南加州公共广播电台的高级记者和主持人，报道商业和经济。

sentences.en: I have also written for The New York Times and Columbia Journalism Review and was a reporting intern at The Times.Originally from Seattle, I graduated cum laude from Occidental College in Los Angeles with a degree in politics.In my free time, I love skiing, tennis, and poker (I competed in the 2024 World Series of Poker Main Event but sadly did not win).
sentences.zh: 我还为《纽约时报》和《哥伦比亚新​​闻评论》撰稿，并曾在《泰晤士报》实习报道。我来自西雅图，以优异的成绩毕业于洛杉矶西方学院，获得政治学学位。在空闲时间，我喜欢滑雪、网球和扑克（我参加了 2024 年世界扑克系列赛主赛事，但遗憾的是没有获胜）。

blocks.html_en: • Startups

sentences.en: Startups
sentences.zh: 初创公司

blocks.html_en: • Tech
• OpenAI

sentences.en: OpenAI
sentences.zh: 开放人工智能

blocks.html_en: • More

content_html_zh:
作者：Ben Bergman 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

今年的大部分时间里，投资者对 Anthropic 的关注度不够，而很大程度上忽视了 OpenAI。 现在潮流正在转变：尽管 Anthropic 仍然是最受欢迎的，但 OpenAI 在发布备受推崇的新模型​​并凭借其 AI 编码代理 Codex 取得成功后，需求大幅增长。

Practical Venture Capital 的创始人兼执行合伙人戴夫·麦克卢尔 (Dave McClure) 表示：“上个月，人们的兴趣重新抬头。”该公司购买 IPO 前公司的二级股票。

由于 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 尚未上市，绝大多数投资者通过二级市场购买，现有股票由员工或早期投资者出售。 市场分散且缺乏流动性，因此所引用的估值只是估计值，而不是连续的公开市场价格。

麦克卢尔表示：“OpenAI 在第一季度面临着许多负面报道，比如增长放缓、高管生病或离职、Anthropic 超越他们以及埃隆·马斯克诉讼等。” “这导致第二季度初对 OpenAI 二级市场的需求大幅减少。”

专注于私人股票交易的商业银行 Rainmaker Securities 的首席执行官格伦·安德森 (Glen Anderson) 表示，Anthropic 仍然占据主导地位，每两个寻求 OpenAI 股票的买家就有 5 个买家。

“一个月前，我们发现对 OpenAI 的需求有限，”他说。 “我们仍然看到对 Anthropic 的巨大需求，但现在你会看到 OpenAI 更频繁地受到竞标。”

OpenAI 没有回应置评请求。

对新车型的乐观态度

Business Insider 采访的二级交易商表示，在 Anthropic 占据主导地位的几个月后，OpenAI 的最新模型和编码代理 Codex 给了买家重新审视的理由。

OpenAI 在 6 月份预览了其旗舰 GPT-5.6 Sol 模型，并于本月与 GPT-5.6 Terra 和成本较低的 GPT-5.6 Luna 一起更广泛地发布。 独立基准测试将 GPT-5.6 Sol 置于该领域的顶尖水平，但仍低于 Claude 最新的 Mythos 和 Fable 模型。

“投资者正在回归 OpenAI，”Augment 联合创始人 Adam Crawley 说道，Augment 是一家针对 IPO 前科技公司的交易所。

Neostellar 的总裁兼首席执行官 Mark Klein 表示，OpenAI 的一位高管上周透露，该公司在其两个旗舰企业平台上的活跃用户已达到 900 万，这让他深受鼓舞：Codex 是一款专为复杂软件工程和编码任务而设计的自主 AI 代理，而 ChatGPT Work 是一款新推出的基于云的 AI 助手，可以执行多步骤的专业工作流程。

克莱因说：“这种增长速度引人注目，因为它表明代理人工智能正在扩展到最初的开发人员受众之外，并进入更广泛的专业工作流程。” “更广泛地说，OpenAI 似乎专注于将持续的模型改进转化为编码、研究和知识工作的持续使用。”

OpenAI 是最便宜的股票

直到今年，Anthropic 的交易价格一直明显低于 OpenAI。 现在情况发生了逆转，一些交易员表示，通过购买相对便宜的 OpenAI 股票来对冲 Anthropic 头寸是有意义的。

据 Business Insider 上周报道，Anthropic 在二级市场的估值飙升至 1.2 万亿美元。 根据二级交易平台 Caplight 的数据，OpenAI 目前的估值为 9330 亿美元，过去三个月上涨了 20%。

上周，OpenAI 首席执行官萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 对公司最近的困境承担了个人责任，同时发出了重大东山再起的信号。

他在 X 上发帖称：“过去 12 个月我们没有取得有史以来最好的成绩，这主要是我的错，但我们即将迎来迄今为止最好的 12 个月。”

在 Altman 承认的同一天，中国人工智能初创公司 Moonshot AI 发布了 Kimi K3，这是一个强大的新模型，该初创公司称该模型是世界上最大的开放权重人工智能系统。

麦克卢尔表示：“来自其他中国和开源竞争对手的压力仍然存在，这可能会给 OpenAI 的增长和利润带来压力，因此他们仍有一段艰难的路要爬。”

阅读下一篇

Ben Bergman 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

我是《商业内幕》的高级记者，主要调查科技行业，重点关注风险投资和初创企业。我经常出现在 CNN、NBC 新闻、哥伦比亚广播公司新闻和其他频道上，提供一系列商业和经济主题的分析。 我还出席了世界各地的数十场大型活动，包括世界经济论坛、HumanX 和网络峰会。如果您有需要在 Signal 上安全讲述的故事，请与我们联系。 以下是我写过的一些故事的例子：

  • 亚当·诺依曼 (Adam Neumann) 创建了一家价值数十亿美元的秘密初创公司，将公寓生活变成乌托邦式的幻想。 我是第一个踏入内部的记者。
  • “2024 年将是僵尸风投清算之年。” 第一波行尸走肉的风险投资公司已经到来，它已经让科技创始人们头疼不已。
  • “野心消亡的地方”：这些科技工作者在疫情期间涌向奥斯汀。 现在他们迫切地想出去。
  • Mira Murati 将她新成立的人工智能初创公司的筹款目标翻了一番，达到 20 亿美元。 这可能是历史上最大的种子轮融资。
  • EvenUp 因其人工智能潜力而估值飙升至 10 亿美元以上。 前员工表示，这家初创公司的大部分工作都依赖人类来完成。
  • 自 2018 年以来，红杉资本一半的风险投资基金都对加州大学捐赠基金造成了损失
  • 当惠特尼·沃尔夫·赫德 (Whitney Wolfe Herd) 成为亿万富翁时，她与一位俄罗斯大亨的致命交易如何让 Bumble 早期员工失去了股票意外之财
  • Mailchimp 创始人承诺永远不会出售、扣留股权，然后以 120 亿美元的价格出售后，员工们感到愤怒
  • “我的工作不是成为首席执行官最好的朋友”：Upfront 的马克·苏斯特 (Mark Suster) 为自己对创始人的严厉而感到自豪，但有些人说他的强硬态度太过分了
  • 独家报道：自2000年以来，加州大学已向风险投资公司投资了数十亿美元，迄今为止已损失数亿美元。 原因如下。

以下是关于我的更多信息：在加入 Insider 之前，我是 dot.LA 的高级记者，并为公共电视台制作了两部调查纪录片，其中一部在 2020 年洛杉矶新闻俱乐部调查类别中获得第一名。 评委们称其为“深度、信息丰富的最佳报道”。 2017-2018 学年，我在哥伦比亚商学院作为经济和商业新闻领域的 Knight-Bagehot 研究员，学习了企业财务、财务会计和企业战略方面的 MBA 级别课程。 此后，我负责监督《华尔街日报》的发展，这是由《华尔街日报》和 Gimlet Media 制作的每日播客。此前，我是 KPCC/南加州公共广播电台的高级记者和主持人，报道商业和经济。 我还为《纽约时报》和《哥伦比亚新​​闻评论》撰稿，并曾在《泰晤士报》实习报道。我来自西雅图，以优异的成绩毕业于洛杉矶西方学院，获得政治学学位。在空闲时间，我喜欢滑雪、网球和扑克（我参加了 2024 年世界扑克系列赛主赛事，但遗憾的是没有获胜）。
